title: Chur, Graubünden — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Chur, Graubünden: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Chur is a city in Graubünden with a population of 37,000. Switzerland’s oldest city and capital of the Graubünden canton, a gateway to the Alps with a well-preserved old town and the starting point of the Glacier Express.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
